name: Cornflake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add vanilla, baking soda, cream of tartar, and flour to the mixture. Blend well.
3. Fold in the cornflakes and chopped pecans.
4. Shape the batter into small mounds and place them on a prepared cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately to prevent sticking when cooled.
